name: Traditional End Table with Storage Drawer Classic  White - Room Essentials™ (Assembly Required)
description:
This Traditional End Table from Room Essentials™ makes a classic addition to your space. Standing at a height of 22 inches on four straight legs, this square table has a pristine white silhouette that blends effortlessly with any decor style and color scheme. It’s designed with a smooth tabletop, a pull drawer and a shelf at the bottom, giving you ample space for display and out-of-sight storage.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 18 inches
Overall Height: 22.17 inches
Overall Depth: 15.67 inches
Distance from floor to bottom shelf: 3.35 inches
Distance between front legs: 14.4 inches
Distance between front leg and back leg: 12 inches
Depth of drawer: 11.78 inches
Width of drawer: 13.4 inches
Height of drawer: 4.7 inches
Width of drawer front: 14 inches
Height of drawer front: 6.3 inches
